scripts.setup: npm install concurrently --no-save && npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:detection
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && python -m venv venv && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe create_db.py && .\venv\Scripts\alembic upgrade head
scripts.setup:detection: cd detection && python -m venv venv && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -c "blue,green,magenta" -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND,DETECTION" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:detection"
